catalog.title: Alpha
catalog.synopsis: Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

catalog.title: Baby Do Die Do
catalog.synopsis: Baby Do Die Do follows the enigmatic Baby KarMarKar, India's first desi hitwoman. Set against the backdrop of Mumbai's underworld, the film combines crime, mystery, action, and dark humour into an entertaining and unpredictable cinematic experience. Baby, a deaf-mute assassin, navigates a dangerous world filled with secrets, violence, and unexpected twists.

catalog.title: Balan - The Boy
catalog.synopsis: A woman walks out of prison with her young son and a past she'll do anything to hide. When their wandering leads them to an unlikely refuge, peace begins to feel possible; until it isn't. Years later, the boy comes back looking for answers.

catalog.title: Cocktail 2
catalog.synopsis: Exploring modern relationships amid emotional turmoil, this sequel features new characters facing current challenges while revisiting themes of love, friendship, and heartbreak.

catalog.title: Dastaar
catalog.synopsis: In 2000s Britain, a turbaned Sikh immigrant loses his close ones to a brutal attack but transforms his grief into courage, rising from a humble immigrant to a community leader, proving that one man’s turban can become the crown of a community.

catalog.title: Dhamaal 4
catalog.synopsis: A new adventure, the same madness-only bigger than ever. The Dhamaal boys are back and ready to chase the “Treasure of Life,” facing crazy challenges along the way. What starts as a treasure hunt quickly turns into a rollercoster of hilarious misadventures.

catalog.title: Disclosure Day
catalog.synopsis:
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people.

We are coming close to … Disclosure Day.

catalog.title: Eben Meen Fehom
catalog.synopsis:
Rushdy (Bayoumi Fouad), a reckless businessman with a past full of short-lived marriages, inherits a fortune.. On one condition: find the son he never knew he had. 
Forced to work with Magda (Leila Alwi), a lawyer who is everything he isn’t, the two set off on a search that gets messier, funnier, and far more complicated than expected.

catalog.title: Ezma
catalog.synopsis:
The story begins when Issa receives a box on the night of his birthday from his old friend Sera. Inside the box are videotapes he left for himself 18 years earlier. In the recordings, the younger Issa explains a game called “Ezma,” which consists of a series of instructions leading to symbolic treasures designed to help him rediscover himself if he ever loses his way over time.
Issa decides to follow the steps of the game with his friend Sera by his side. With every clue he solves, he is forced to confront his past and his deepest fears, while gradually reconnecting with his long-lost passion for filmmaking. Throughout this journey, Issa moves closer to fulfilling his dream of directing a documentary that creates a dialogue between his past and present, ultimately leading him to rediscover himself and understand the true meaning of love.

catalog.title: FIFA 2026: Spain vs Argentina
catalog.synopsis: English commentary session

catalog.title: FIFA 2026: Spain vs Argentina
catalog.synopsis: Arabic commentary session

catalog.title: Gatta Kusthi 2
catalog.synopsis: Veera is a devoted husband and father who proudly takes care of his home while supporting his wife Keerthy's successful wrestling career. But when misunderstandings, societal judgment, and an unexpected incident threaten to tear their family apart, Veera finds himself fighting the toughest battle of his life - not in an arena, but for the love and trust of his wife and daughter.

catalog.title: I, Nobody
catalog.synopsis: An ordinary government employee and family man accidentally witnesses a crime that turns his quiet life upside down. As he becomes the prime target of a corrupt system determined to silence him, he must fight to protect his family and prove the truth before it's too late.

catalog.title: Idhayam Murali
catalog.synopsis: A heartwarming tale of friendship, love, and destiny as Idhayaa journeys through different stages of life.

catalog.title: Jana Nayagan
catalog.synopsis: Two Ideologies: One truth, One thirst for control. A child's fear ignites a former police officer into a battle far beyond personal revenge.

catalog.title: Lenin
catalog.synopsis: : Set in the rustic landscapes of Rayalaseema, Lenin is a rural romantic action-drama that follows a fierce protagonist navigating deep family rivalries and political friction. The story delves into intense themes of revolution, leadership, and the harsh realities of honour killings.

catalog.title: Love, Ngo
catalog.synopsis:
When Ngongo (Jerald Napoles), a young man with a cleft lip, meets Scarlet (Louise delos Reyes), the first woman he truly loves, he dares to dream of a life beyond his insecurities. But Scarlet’s family sees only
his condition and wants him out of her life. Now he must overcome his insecurities and self-hatred to realize that
true acceptance begins with loving himself.

catalog.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga
catalog.synopsis: A story of love, longing, and belonging rooted in Partition-era migration. Examines memory, nostalgia, and emotional ties to home and loved ones, exploring how the past shapes identity and sustains the human spirit across generations.

catalog.title: Michael
catalog.synopsis:
Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known.

 

The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.

catalog.title: Minions & Monsters
catalog.synopsis: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

catalog.title: Moana
catalog.synopsis: Live-action adaptation of the 2016 Disney animated film 'Moana'.

catalog.title: Obsession
catalog.synopsis: A bold new voice in horror. After breaking the mysterious “One Wish Willow” to win his crush’s heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

catalog.title: Sakr w Canaria
catalog.synopsis: Saqr, a legendary mercenary decides to leave his dangerous double life behind and start fresh. But an unexpected encounter with Bilal, a failed writer obsessed with the world of espionage, turns his plans upside down. The unlikely duo find themselves thrown into a thrilling yet hilarious ride that changes everything - unlike anything they’ve ever known.

catalog.title: Shamshoun w Dalila
catalog.synopsis: In a blend of comedy, suspense, and action, Samson is forced to steal a legendary diamond to rescue his kidnapped sister, while Delilah is mysteriously tasked with stealing it for herself. Their missions intersect in a chase filled with tricks, pranks, and clever confrontations, transforming their seemingly disparate paths into an unexpected love story. Ultimately, they are forced to join forces with an international alliance to determine who is the best and to seize the diamond at any cost.

catalog.title: Siccin 9
catalog.synopsis: An ancient curse awakened by a mother's scream has waited in silence for decades. When her grandson crosses the threshold of his father's home, the cycle of darkness begins anew.

catalog.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
catalog.synopsis: After the record-breaking global success of Spider-Man: No Way Home, Spider-Man: Brand New Day marks an entirely new chapter for Peter Parker and Spider-Man. Four years have passed since the events of No Way Home, and Peter is now an adult living entirely alone, having voluntarily erased himself from the lives and memories of those he loves. Crime-fighting in a New York that no longer knows his name, he's devoted himself entirely to protecting his city - a full-time Spider-Man - but as the demands on him intensify, the pressure sparks a surprising physical evolution that threatens his existence, even as a strange new pattern of crimes gives rise to one of the most powerful threats he has ever faced.

catalog.title: Supergirl
catalog.synopsis: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

catalog.title: The Match: FIFA WC Documentary
catalog.synopsis: THE MATCH tells the story behind the iconic 1986 FIFA World Cup clash between Argentina and England. Featuring rare archival footage, including Maradona's infamous "Hand of God" goal, the documentary explores how history and the Falklands War shaped one of football's greatest rivalries, revealing how the game can rise above the scars of conflict.

catalog.title: The Odyssey
catalog.synopsis: The Odyssey - In Cinemas 16.07.26 Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in cinemas everywhere on July 16, 2026. The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron. The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

catalog.title: The Sheep Detectives
catalog.synopsis: In this witty, new breed of mystery, George (Hugh Jackman) is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can’t possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realise they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

catalog.title: Toy Story 5
catalog.synopsis: Woody, Buzz, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they're introduced to electronics, a new threat to playtime.

catalog.title: Varavu
catalog.synopsis: A family falls victim to the powerful elite in a small town. Time passes; wounds fester. One man's return force a confrontation that will expose decades of lies and corruption.

catalog.title: Welcome to the Jungle
catalog.synopsis:
Welcome to the Jungle is a comedy-action adventure where a group of quirky characters gets stuck in a dangerous jungle during a chaotic mission. 
Filled with confusion, criminals, and hilarious situations, they must work together to survive and find their way out
